testsuite.name: Loan Decision API agrees with the personal-loan rules, per scenario

testcase.name: decline-low-score — credit score below 580 declines
decline-high-dti — DTI over 50% declines
review-score-band — score 580-669 routes to review
review-dti-band — DTI 40-50% routes to review
approve-prime — prime, low DTI, auto-approves at 6.5%
approve-midband — 660-719 band, low DTI, auto-approve at 9.9%
approve-loyalty — existing customer loyalty discount
